request_notes.special_instructions: Use the Google Account Data & Privacy portal to submit your SAR.

Data subject requests should be submitted through automated self-service system. DPO email is for policy-related inquiries only. For Glassdoor services, submit requests via privacy portal. EU GDPR representative: Glassdoor Hiring Solutions Ireland Ltd; UK GDPR representative: Glassdoor Global Ltd
Contact Privacy Team and DPO at listed address. Zendesk is a data processor under GDPR; customer data controllers bear primary responsibility for GDPR compliance.

Contact Data Protection Officer via email for GDPR inquiries. Alternative Luxembourg office contact: dpo@interactivebrokers.lu. For general client inquiries contact IBKR Client Service through IBKR website at ibkr.com/help

paypal.com.legal_entity_name: PayPal (Europe) S.à r.l. et Cie, S.C.A.

request_notes.special_instructions: Requests can be submitted through Privacy Request Form or via email to DPO. Messenger contact also available through Intercom platform.
For GDPR data subject access requests (DSAR), contact privacy@substackinc.com. EEA and UK users should contact Substack local representatives (contact details in privacy policy).

postal_address.line1: c/o CT Corporation, 330 North Brand Boulevard

request_notes.special_instructions: EU representative: Glassdoor Hiring Solutions Ireland Ltd. UK representative: Glassdoor Global Ltd. Identity verification required for all requests.

finalroundai.com.legal_entity_name: Pump Labs Inc., dba Final Round AI

request_notes.special_instructions: No specific DPO email listed; use general privacy contact email for GDPR requests

UK residents can also contact Bird & Bird GDPR Representative UK at 12 New Fetter Lane, Holburn, London EC4A 1JP for UK-specific GDPR inquiries. DPO can be contacted online or offline. Privacy requests can also be submitted through PayPal's Privacy Hub by clicking 'Ask questions about privacy'.

PayPal also provides online contact through Privacy Hub. Account holders can submit requests through 'Data and Privacy' in Account Settings. Non-account holders can access privacy portal. Alternative UK contact: PayPal UK Ltd, 5 Fleet Place, London EC4M 7RD, United Kingdom.
Xoom is a service of PayPal, Inc. GDPR contacts are listed in the Privacy Statement for EEA residents. For EEA residents, use help-eea@xoom.com or contact the PayPal DPO.
Whop privacy policy explicitly directs GDPR/data subject requests to support@whop.com — no dedicated DPO email exists.

Contact DPO and Privacy Team. Zendesk is a data processor, not a controller, for customer data processed through products. For questions about how Zendesk uses your personal data (website visitors, business contacts), use the contacts above.
